# Daily Standup Template

## Purpose
Ensure daily synchronization, surface impediments quickly, and reinforce sprint goals.

## Audience
Scrum Master, Delivery Team, Product Owner (optional), Stakeholders (observers only).

## Inputs
- Sprint plan (`docs/templates/product/sprint-plan-template-agile.md`).
- Sprint backlog and task board.
- Impediment log or risk register updates.

---

## Meeting Information
- **Date:**
- **Sprint:**
- **Facilitator:**
- **Time:**
- **Duration:** 15 minutes
- **Location/platform:**

## Standup Format
### Standard Questions
1. What did I complete yesterday?
2. What will I work on today?
3. What blockers or impediments do I have?

### Team Member Updates
#### [Team Member Name]
- **Yesterday:**
- **Today:**
- **Blockers:**
- **Status:** On Track / At Risk / Blocked

#### [Team Member Name]
- **Yesterday:**
- **Today:**
- **Blockers:**
- **Status:** On Track / At Risk / Blocked

## Sprint Progress Snapshot
### Sprint Goal
- **Goal:**

### Backlog Status
| Story | Owner | Status | Progress | Blockers |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |

### Burndown Check
- **Total story points:**
- **Completed:**
- **Remaining:**
- **Days left:**
- **Trend:** Ahead / On track / Behind

## Impediments Tracking
### New Impediments
| Impediment | Reporter | Impact | Priority | Owner | Target Resolution |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |

### Existing Impediments
| Impediment | Status | Owner | Update | Next Steps |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |

## Action Items
- [ ] Action item — Owner: [Name] — Due: [Date]
- [ ] Action item — Owner: [Name] — Due: [Date]

## Facilitator Checklist
- [ ] Keep time-boxed and focused on the three questions.
- [ ] Capture blockers and assign follow-up owners.
- [ ] Defer problem-solving to separate sessions.

## Standup Health Check
- **Attendance:** [#]/[#]
- **Engagement:** High / Medium / Low
- **Focus:** On Track / Some Drift / Off Topic
- **Improvements:**

## Next Standup
- **Date/time:**
- **Focus areas:**
